name: wlb-skills
description: A collection of skills that help business users analyze requirements and generate test scenarios, test cases, and test data.
author: bomb0069

skills.name: wlb-test-engineer
skills.description: Design test cases using BVA, Equivalence Partitioning, Multi-Condition Analysis, or State Transition Testing.

skills.name: wlb-sdet
skills.description: Convert test cases into unit test code. Supports Java, Kotlin, TypeScript/JS, Python, Go, and C#/.NET.
